'''鈭歨-b-n''' ('''habana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jaunce|jaunce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jaunce|jaunce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-b-n
|-
! Lemma
| habana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:habanithi|habanithi]] || [[word:habaniji|habaniji]] || [[word:habanishi|habanishi]] || [[word:habani|habani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:habanuthuth|habanuthuth]] || [[word:habanujuj|habanujuj]] || [[word:habanushush|habanushush]] || [[word:haban|haban]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:habanuthu|habanuthu]] || [[word:habanuju|habanuju]] || [[word:habanushu|habanushu]] || [[word:habanu|habanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:habanufuth|habanufuth]] || [[word:habanufuj|habanufuj]] || [[word:habanufush|habanufush]] || [[word:habanuf|habanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:habanethe|habanethe]] || [[word:habaneje|habaneje]] || [[word:habaneshe|habaneshe]] || [[word:habane|habane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:habanothoth|habanothoth]] || [[word:habanojoj|habanojoj]] || [[word:habanoshosh|habanoshosh]] || [[word:haban|haban]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:habanotho|habanotho]] || [[word:habanojo|habanojo]] || [[word:habanosho|habanosho]] || [[word:habano|habano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:habanofoth|habanofoth]] || [[word:habanofoj|habanofoj]] || [[word:habanofosh|habanofosh]] || [[word:habanof|habanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:haban忙th忙|haban忙th忙]] || [[word:haban忙j忙|haban忙j忙]] || [[word:haban忙sh忙|haban忙sh忙]] || [[word:haban忙|haban忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:habanathath|habanathath]] || [[word:habanajaj|habanajaj]] || [[word:habanashash|habanashash]] || [[word:haban|haban]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:habanatha|habanatha]] || [[word:habanaja|habanaja]] || [[word:habanasha|habanasha]] || [[word:habana|habana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:habanafath|habanafath]] || [[word:habanafaj|habanafaj]] || [[word:habanafash|habanafash]] || [[word:habanaf|habanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:habanasha|habanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohabanasha|gohabanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihabanasha|gokihabanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:haban眉sha|haban眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohabankn眉sha|gohabankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihaban眉sha|gokihaban眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:habansh毛sha|habansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohabanksh毛sha|gohabanksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihabansh毛sha|gokihabansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:habanrosha|habanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohabankrosha|gohabankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihabanrosha|gokihabanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:habanmusha|habanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohabankmusha|gohabankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihabanmusha|gokihabanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:habansherasha|habansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohabanksherasha|gohabanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihabansherasha|gokihabansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:habangasha|habangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohabankngasha|gohabankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihabangasha|gokihabangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:habanyasha|habanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohabankyasha|gohabankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihabanyasha|gokihabanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:habanyamasha|habanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohabankyamasha|gohabankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihabanyamasha|gokihabanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:haban眉sh毛sha|haban眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohabankn眉sh毛sha|gohabankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihaban眉sh毛sha|gokihaban眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:haban眉rosha|haban眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohabankn眉rosha|gohabankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihaban眉rosha|gokihaban眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:haban眉musha|haban眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohabankn眉musha|gohabankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihaban眉musha|gokihaban眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:habansh毛n眉sha|habansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohabanksh毛n眉sha|gohabanksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihabansh毛n眉sha|gokihabansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:habansh毛rosha|habansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohabanksh毛rosha|gohabanksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihabansh毛rosha|gokihabansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:habansh毛musha|habansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohabanksh毛musha|gohabanksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihabansh毛musha|gokihabansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:habanron眉sha|habanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohabankron眉sha|gohabankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihabanron眉sha|gokihabanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:habanrosh毛sha|habanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohabankrosh毛sha|gohabankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihabanrosh毛sha|gokihabanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:habanromusha|habanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohabankromusha|gohabankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihabanromusha|gokihabanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:habanmun眉sha|habanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohabankmun眉sha|gohabankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihabanmun眉sha|gokihabanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:habanmush毛sha|habanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohabankmush毛sha|gohabankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihabanmush毛sha|gokihabanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:habanmurosha|habanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohabankmurosha|gohabankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihabanmurosha|gokihabanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:haban|haban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:h忙b忙n|h忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohaban|hohaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoh忙b忙n|hoh忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohaban|hohohaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoh忙b忙n|hohoh忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉haban|n眉haban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉h忙b忙n|n眉h忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉haban|n眉n眉haban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉h忙b忙n|n眉n眉h忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂haban|n茂haban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂h忙b忙n|n茂h忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂haban|n茂n茂haban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂h忙b忙n|n茂n茂h忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhaban|luhaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luh忙b忙n|luh忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhaban|luluhaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluh忙b忙n|luluh忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihaban|lihaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lih忙b忙n|lih忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihaban|lilihaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilih忙b忙n|lilih忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohaban|kohaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koh忙b忙n|koh忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohaban|kokohaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoh忙b忙n|kokoh忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehaban|kehaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keh忙b忙n|keh忙b忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehaban|kekehaban]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeh忙b忙n|kekeh忙b忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
